---
applyTo: "index.md,about.md,projects.md,blog/index.md,_projects/*.md,_posts/*.md"
---

These files are portfolio content files.

Preserve existing frontmatter unless the request requires changing it.

When updating an existing file, keep the page structure and refine only the requested copy.

For project files, keep the description tight and the body structured with short sections.

For blog posts, keep the title clear and the body readable with meaningful headings.

If the `portfolioSite` MCP server is available, prefer its tools for reading and writing these files.
